import sys, io, json, urllib.request
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

# 스캔 결과 폴링
req = urllib.request.Request\('http://localhost:8090/api/scan/1/poll'\)
res = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
data = json.loads\(res.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)
print\(json.dumps\(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)

# 상세 데이터
req2 = urllib.request.Request\('http://localhost:8090/api/scan/1'\)
res2 = urllib.request.urlopen\(req2\)
detail = json.loads\(res2.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)

print\(f'variants: {len\(detail.get\(\\"variants\\", []\)\)}'\)
print\(f'products: {len\(detail.get\(\\"products\\", []\)\)}'\)

print\(f'score: {scan.get\(\\"opportunity_score\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'category: {scan.get\(\\"category\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'recommended: {scan.get\(\\"recommended_keyword\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'status: {scan.get\(\\"status\\"\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

import subprocess, time, os

# 별도 user-data-dir 사용
debug_profile = os.path.join\(os.environ['TEMP'], 'chrome-debug-profile'\)
os.makedirs\(debug_profile, exist_ok=True\)

proc = subprocess.Popen\([
    r'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe',
    '--remote-debugging-port=9222',
    '--remote-allow-origins=*',
    f'--user-data-dir={debug_profile}',
]\)
print\(f'Chrome PID: {proc.pid}'\)
time.sleep\(5\)

import urllib.request
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\('http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version', timeout=3\)
    print\('CDP OK!'\)
    print\(resp.read\(\).decode\(\)[:300]\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'CDP FAIL: {e}'\)
")

import subprocess, time, os

ext_base = os.path.join\(os.environ['LOCALAPPDATA'], 'Google', 'Chrome', 'User Data', 'Default', 'Extensions'\)
helpstore_ext = os.path.join\(ext_base, 'nfbjgieajobfohijlkaaplipbiofblef'\)

# 확장 프로그램 버전 폴더 찾기
versions = os.listdir\(helpstore_ext\)
ext_path = os.path.join\(helpstore_ext, versions[0]\)
print\(f'Extension path: {ext_path}'\)

# 디버그 전용 프로필
debug_profile = os.path.join\(os.environ['TEMP'], 'chrome-debug-helpstore'\)
os.makedirs\(debug_profile, exist_ok=True\)

proc = subprocess.Popen\([
    r'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe',
    '--remote-debugging-port=9222',
    '--remote-allow-origins=*',
    f'--user-data-dir={debug_profile}',
    f'--load-extension={ext_path}',
    '--disable-extensions-except=' + ext_path,
    'https://helpstore.shop/keyword/keyword_analyze_coupang/',
]\)
print\(f'Chrome PID: {proc.pid}'\)
time.sleep\(8\)

import urllib.request
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\('http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version', timeout=5\)
    print\('CDP OK!'\)
    print\(resp.read\(\).decode\(\)[:200]\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'CDP FAIL: {e}'\)
")

import logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.DEBUG\)
import asyncio
from analyzer.helpstore import HelpstoreBrowser

async def test\(\):
    browser = HelpstoreBrowser\('http://localhost:9222'\)
    try:
        await browser.connect\(\)
        print\('[OK] CDP connected'\)
        await browser.login_if_needed\(\)
        print\('[OK] Login done, URL:', browser.page.url\)
        # Just check page content
        content = await browser.page.content\(\)
        print\('[OK] Page length:', len\(content\)\)
        print\('[OK] Has keyword input:', '#keyword' in content or 'id=\\"keyword\\"' in content\)
        print\('[OK] isLogin:', 'isLogin = true' in content or 'isLogin = false' in content\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'[ERROR] {e}'\)
    finally:
        await browser.close\(\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/pnp28/claude/sourcing && python -c "
import logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO\)
import asyncio
from analyzer.helpstore import HelpstoreBrowser

async def test\(\):
    browser = HelpstoreBrowser\('http://localhost:9222'\)
    try:
        await browser.connect\(\)
        await browser.login_if_needed\(\)
        print\('[1] Page URL:', browser.page.url\)
        print\('[2] Searching keyword...'\)

        products = await browser.search_coupang_products\('남자 깔창'\)
        print\(f'[3] Products found: {len\(products\)}'\)
        for p in products[:5]:
            print\(f'  #{p.ranking} {p.product_name[:30]} | {p.price:,}원 | 판매량:{p.sales_monthly} | 매출:{p.revenue_monthly:,}'\)

    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        print\(f'[ERROR] {e}'\)
        traceback.print_exc\(\)
    finally:
        await browser.close\(\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
